title: Avoid edge hype: where Workers and Edge pay off
meta_description: Cut API response time 75% with Cloudflare Workers in 2026 — real latency, cold start, and cost numbers from a 2.1M-rpd production system, plus when Vercel Edge Functions actually save money.
prewritten_tweet:
Most teams burn $200+/month and 2 weeks of debugging to save 20 ms of latency.

Edge functions are only worth it when the whole request path is edge-native.

https://kubaik.github.io/avoid-edge-hype-where-workers-and-edge-pay-off
